overview.summary: Hash maps store data in key-value pairs, allowing lightning-fast data retrieval.
overview.interviewRelevance: The most commonly used data structure in coding interviews to achieve O(1) lookups.

paragraphs: Python's dict, JavaScript's object, and Java's HashMap are all hash maps.
O(1) lookup powers every database index, every cache, and every language's symbol table.
Git stores every commit by its SHA-256 hash in a hash map of the object store.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: Hash maps skip the search process entirely by mathematically calculating exactly where the answer lives.

definition.technicalDefinition: A hash map is a data structure that implements an associative array, mapping keys to values. A hash function computes an index into an array of buckets, from which the desired value can be found.

vocabulary.definition: A mathematical algorithm that maps data of arbitrary size to a fixed-size integer.
When two different keys generate the same hash index.
A collision resolution technique where each bucket is a linked list of entries.

keyProperties: Average O(1) time complexity for search, insert, and delete.
Worst-case O(N) if many collisions occur or resizing is triggered.

operations.name: Insert
operations.description: Hash the key to find the index, then store the key-value pair.
operations.visualNote: The key is transformed, mapped to a bucket, and stored.

operations.name: Lookup
operations.description: Hash the key, go directly to the index, and retrieve the value.
operations.visualNote: Jumps straight to the exact bucket containing the value.

operations.name: Delete
operations.description: Hash the key, locate the entry, and remove it.
operations.visualNote: The precise sub-item in the bucket is removed.

practice.title: Two Sum
practice.keyInsight: Store seen values and their indices to achieve O(N) total runtime.

practice.title: Group Anagrams
practice.keyInsight: Use a sorted string or character count tuple as the hash map key.

practice.title: Top K Frequent Elements
practice.keyInsight: Hash map tallies frequencies, followed by a heap or bucket sort.

practice.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
practice.keyInsight: A Set (hash map without values) allows O(1) checks for neighboring numbers.

practice.title: Subarray Sum Equals K
practice.keyInsight: Store running prefix sums in a hash map to look back for exact differences.

practice.title: Valid Sudoku
practice.keyInsight: Multiple coordinate sets/hash maps enforce uniqueness rules.
